context: Tests whether the ios-networking skill guidance is applied to URLSession API client architecture, response validation, retry behavior, middleware, and security boundaries.

checklist.name: Status Validation
checklist.description: Requires validating HTTPURLResponse status codes before decoding and treating HTTP errors separately from transport errors.

checklist.name: Session Configuration
checklist.description: Recommends a configured URLSession for production needs such as timeouts, caching, delegates, or waitsForConnectivity instead of defaulting to URLSession.shared.

checklist.name: Retry Discipline
checklist.description: Excludes cancellation and most 4xx client errors from retry logic while allowing appropriate retries such as 429, network loss, or 5xx failures.

checklist.name: Request Middleware
checklist.description: Centralizes auth headers and similar cross-cutting request changes in middleware or a request builder rather than hardcoding tokens per request.

checklist.name: Token Boundary
checklist.description: States that sensitive tokens must not be stored in UserDefaults and routes detailed credential storage to the security boundary without expanding into a full Keychain guide.

checklist.name: Transport Testing
checklist.description: Mentions URLProtocol or equivalent transport-level testing when request construction and response handling need verification.

checklist.name: Scope Control
checklist.description: Keeps the answer focused on iOS networking client corrections rather than redesigning unrelated app architecture.
